name: Makima 🧡 Date at the Cinema. | Chainsaw Man
description:
Makima with a sprite system.

This bot isn't designed as a villain, but rather as an antihero. You can build a romantic relationship with her.

I based this on the sprite system by @MOLIS and reworked it
(I used my own stickers from Telegram, I didn't use his assets.)

It should work now, because one of the latest updates to Janitor broke his bot.
